title: CobbleMorph
description: Morph into any Cobblemon you'd like!
body:
# CobbleMorph

**CobbleMorph** is a lightweight mod that allows players to transform into any Pokémon using simple commands.

This mod **requires Cobblemon** to function. CobbleMorph is compatible with mods and datapacks that modify existing Pokémon models, add models for Pokémon that are not yet implemented, or introduce custom content such as Fakemon or Mega Evolutions (for example through Mega Showdown).

**Some limitations currently exist. Certain aspects such as `cosmetic_item=...` may not work properly.**

The transformation is **purely cosmetic**. It does **not** change your hitbox, modify your first-person hand model, or provide any gameplay advantages.

## Commands

`/transform {username} {pokemon} [aspects]`

`/untransform {username}`

These commands require **operator permissions by default**.

## Future plans

If people enjoy the mod, I plan to continue updating it.
Feel free to suggest ideas such as:

* Changing the first-person hand model
* Adding an item to transform into a Pokémon from your team
* Transforming into the Pokémon you are currently looking at
* Any other fun features
